classes.reasoning: Document is explicitly titled 'eCRF MODULE: CYCLE 4 DAY 1 VISIT' and contains structured case report form sections capturing per-patient, per-visit clinical data including vital signs, ECOG performance status, study drug dispensing, concomitant medications, adverse events, PRO questionnaires, laboratory results, and investigator sign-off. All hallmarks of a Case Report Form.

summary: This is a Case Report Form capturing data from the Cycle 4 Day 1 visit for patient BRC471-ES03-006 at site ES-03 in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The four-page eCRF (form version 2.1, visit date 18/11/2023) documents vital signs, ECOG performance status, study drug dispensing (200mg BID, 100mg tablets), concomitant medications, three adverse events (acneiform rash, fatigue, dry eyes), PRO questionnaire completion, and laboratory results, with investigator sign-off by Dr. Carmen Fuentes.
references_to: Study BIORCE-NEU-2022-004 (conflicting study number noted as error)
content:
================================================================================
eCRF MODULE: CYCLE 4 DAY 1 VISIT
Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001          [PAGE 1]
Form Version: 2.1
Site ID: ES-03    Patient Code: BRC471-ES03-006
Visit Date: 18/11/2023    Entered by: J.Rueda    Verified: Dr. C. Fuentes
================================================================================

SECTION 1 -- VITAL SIGNS (pre-dose)
  Systolic BP: 126 mmHg | Diastolic: 80 mmHg | HR: 70 bpm
  Weight: 67.4 kg | SpO2: 98% | Temp: 36.5 degrees C

SECTION 2 -- ECOG PS: [X] 1

SECTION 3 -- STUDY DRUG DISPENSING
  Kit: KIT-471-ES03-014 | Tablets (100mg): 56 | Dose: [X] 200mg BID
  Ondansetron: [X] Yes

SECTION 4 -- CONCOMITANT MEDICATIONS
  Omeprazole 20mg QD -- GERD -- since 2019 -- ongoing
  Atorvastatin 40mg QD -- Hypercholesterolaemia -- since 2020 -- ongoing

================================================================================
[PAGE 2 -- ADVERSE EVENTS]
Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001    Patient: BRC471-ES03-006
================================================================================

SECTION 5 -- ADVERSE EVENTS
  AE#1: Acneiform rash face/chest -- Grade 1 -- ongoing from C1D8
    Relationship: Probably related | SAE: No
    Action: Topical clindamycin; stable

  AE#2: Fatigue -- Grade 1 -- ongoing -- possibly related -- no action

  AE#3: Dry eyes -- Grade 1 -- new this cycle
    Onset: approx 05/11/2023 | Relationship: Possibly related | SAE: No
    Action: Artificial tears (ophthalmology, 10/11/2023)

SECTION 6 -- PRO QUESTIONNAIRES
  EORTC QLQ-C30: [X] Completed | EORTC QLQ-LC13: [X] Completed

================================================================================
[PAGE 3 -- LABORATORY RESULTS ATTACHMENT]
Study: BIORCE-NEU-2022-004              <-- *** CONFLICTING STUDY NUMBER ***
Patient: BRC471-ES03-006    Lab date: 18/11/2023
[NOTE: lab report header pre-printed with wrong study code -- known site
 error reported as DEV-ES03-002; correct study is BIORCE-ONC-2023-001;
 values verified against source by CRA Marcos Iglesias 22/11/2023]
================================================================================

HAEMATOLOGY
  WBC:  6.2  x10^9/L  [N]   Ref: 4.0-10.0
  ANC:  3.8  x10^9/L  [N]   Ref: 1.8-7.5
  Hb:  12.1  g/dL     [N]   Ref: 12.0-16.0
  Plt:  198  x10^9/L  [N]   Ref: 150-400

CHEMISTRY
  ALT:  31  U/L     [N]   Ref: <35
  AST:  27  U/L     [N]   Ref: <35
  Creat: 68  umol/L  [N]   Ref: 44-80
  Na:  138  mmol/L  [N]   Ref: 136-145

================================================================================
[PAGE 4 -- INVESTIGATOR SIGN-OFF]
Study: BIORCE-ONC-2023-001    Patient: BRC471-ES03-006
================================================================================

I confirm that the data recorded on pages 1-4 accurately reflect the
source documents held at this site. The study number discrepancy on
page 3 (lab header) has been documented as protocol deviation DEV-ES03-002
and does not affect the validity of the laboratory results.

                                        [-- DATE CONFLICT BELOW --]
Investigator: Dr. Carmen Fuentes
Signature:    [SIGNED]
Date:         03/11/2023      <-- *** PREDATES visit date of 18/11/2023 ***

[Handwritten correction:]
  "Date error -- should read 18/11/2023. Signed same day as visit.
   Corrected per SDV query Q-ES03-004. -- CF 22/11/2023"

================================================================================
END OF CRF -- CYCLE 4 DAY 1 -- SITE ES-03 -- PATIENT BRC471-ES03-006
Scanned by J.Rueda, 22/11/2023
